v3_plan_recommended_sequence.description: Design value normalization contracts and source-unit policy.
Define operation taxonomy and unsupported operation handling.
Define stat identity resolution policy and target-domain scope.
Define evidence requirements for skill identity bridges.
Create existing-production golden baselines before mechanical changes.
Design deterministic adapter behavior and explanations.
Add opt-in dry-run comparison without changing production output.
Compare item and affix mechanical output under approved gates.
Compare passive and skill output under approved identity and unsupported policies.
Expose limited opt-in mechanical adapter mode after dry-run evidence.
Audit production remap gates and rollback/debug path.
Production remap only after all stable-calculable gates pass.
